ai_summary: Mawana Sugars Limited has announced its 62nd Annual General Meeting for July 4, 2026, where a 40% (₹2 per share) final dividend for FY 2025-26 will be considered. The primary focus of this communication is the mandatory update of shareholder PAN, KYC, and bank details, especially for physical shareholdings, as stipulated by a recent SEBI circular. Critically, non-compliance will result in the withholding of dividend payments and ineligibility for RTA services, posing a significant operational impact for affected shareholders.
